author: chuanqz
description: Select a prompt and refine it with an LLM. Two modes: template-driven structured optimization, and template-free light polishing (disambiguate / dedupe / mark missing info with placeholders). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: chuanqq
manifest.description: Select a prompt and refine it with an LLM. Two modes: template-driven structured optimization, and template-free light polishing (disambiguate / dedupe / mark missing info with placeholders).
manifest.name: User Prompt Optimizer

name: User Prompt Optimizer

releases.author: chuanqq
releases.description:
- Address Obsidian reviewer source-code warnings (W2-W11)
- Keep streaming-required fetch (with explanatory comments)
- Improve type safety in SSE JSON parsing
- Use Obsidian DOM helpers (createEl / setCssStyles / setCssProps / Setting.setHeading)
- Wrap async event callbacks for void-returning signatures
